examples.title: Pseudocode: ERC20 Token Template
examples.description: A basic ERC20 token template in pseudocode
examples.code:
FUNCTION totalSupply()
 RETURN totalTokens

FUNCTION balanceOf(address)
 RETURN balances[address]

FUNCTION transfer(address, amount)
 IF balances[msg.sender] >= amount THEN
 balances[msg.sender] -= amount
 balances[address] += amount
 RETURN TRUE
 ELSE
 RETURN FALSE

FUNCTION approve(spender, amount)
 allowances[msg.sender][spender] = amount
 RETURN TRUE

FUNCTION transferFrom(from, to, amount)
 IF allowances[from][msg.sender] >= amount AND balances[from] >= amount THEN
 balances[from] -= amount
 balances[to] += amount
 allowances[from][msg.sender] -= amount
 RETURN TRUE
 ELSE
 RETURN FALSE
examples.explanation: This pseudocode demonstrates the basic functions of an ERC20 token template, including total supply, balance, transfer, approve, and transfer from.
